greeting.speaker: Owen the Lorekeeper
greeting.text: Ah, a seeker of knowledge? There are ancient texts scattered through these halls.

choices.text: I'd like to help preserve them.

lore_intro.speaker: Owen the Lorekeeper
lore_intro.text: Three ancient scrolls lie within these walls. Find them all and I shall share their wisdom with you.

lore_complete.speaker: Owen the Lorekeeper
lore_complete.text: All three! Remarkable. The knowledge within will serve you well. Take this as thanks.
